name: welgo-coo-plugin
description: Welgo COO + GSM team plugin. Dual-auth (tailnet OR bearer). Operator self-identify (OPERATOR slug). Bundles 3 Brain-MCP-wrapping slash commands (/welgo-status, /welgo-capture, /welgo-delegate) + ONBOARDING + CHEATSHEET + SKILLS-OVERVIEW. Session-start: auto-update check + force-read-cheatsheet on version bump. Mandate: Claude Code is the operator surface, Brain is the system of record.
